data.content:
# Implementation handoff — foolery-e55a (Approval escalation API)

**Branch:** worktree-foolery-e55a-approvals-api
**Commit:** fc4cce778606d9cf23e586305b1000694cc0d9a1
**Lease:** foolery-f048

## What landed

- `src/lib/approval-registry.ts` — singleton `Map<approvalId, ApprovalRegistryEntry>` on `globalThis`. Records are shared refs with `entry.pendingApprovals`. APIs: `registerApproval`, `attachResponderForSession`, `detachSession`, `listApprovals(filter)`, `getApproval`, `clearApprovalRegistry`, `approvalDtoFromEntry`.
- `src/lib/terminal-approval-session.ts` — adds `applyApprovalAction(approvalId, action)` (canonical path) and refactors so both it and the legacy `performApprovalAction(entry, ...)` share a single `executeApprovalAction(...)` helper. `recordPendingApproval` now mirrors records into the registry; `attachApprovalResponder` updates the registry's responder ref.
- `src/lib/terminal-session-cleanup.ts` — single chokepoint `cleanupTerminalSessionResources(id, reason)` calls `detachSession(id, reason)` then `getTerminalSessions().delete(id)`. Replaces `sessions.delete(id)` in `terminal-manager.ts:464`, `terminal-manager-initial-finish.ts`, `terminal-manager-initial-child-helpers.ts`, and `terminal-test-fixture.ts`. (`orchestration-session-lifecycle.ts` and `local-worker.ts` were intentionally left alone — they manage different session maps that don't carry approvals.)
- `src/app/api/approvals/route.ts` — `GET` with filters: `_repo`, `active`, `status` (repeatable + CSV), `updatedSince`. Deterministic ordering: `updatedAt desc`, tie-break `approvalId asc`.
- `src/app/api/approvals/[approvalId]/actions/route.ts` — `POST` with `approve | always_approve | reject`. 200 on success, 400 invalid action, 404 unknown id, 409 with `code: approval_responder_unavailable` after detach (record stays in queue), 502 on responder failure.
- `src/app/api/terminal/[sessionId]/approvals/[approvalId]/route.ts` — verifies session, then delegates to `applyApprovalAction` so behaviour matches canonical path exactly.
- `src/lib/openapi/schemas-approvals.ts` + `paths-approvals.ts` — `ApprovalEscalation`, `ApprovalAction`, `ApprovalEscalationStatus`, `ApprovalReplyTarget`, `ApprovalAgentInfo`, `ApprovalActionRequest/Response/ErrorResponse`. `TerminalSession.pendingApprovals` documented as compatibility array. New `Approvals` tag in `openapi-spec.ts`.
- `src/lib/approval-escalation-api.ts` + `session-approval-hydration.ts` — `fetchApprovalEscalations({active,repoPath,updatedSince})` + `hydrateApprovalEscalationsFromApi()`. `useRehydrateTerminals` (`use-terminal-panel-effects.ts`) now calls the API hydrator on every poll instead of deriving from the session list.

## Design decisions

- **Detach status** — `detachSession` flips active records to `manual_required`, logs `approval.session_detached`, and clears `responder` to null. `actionable=false`, `actionableReason="approval_responder_unavailable"`.
- **HTTP code for detached actions** — chose **409** with `code: approval_responder_unavailable` over 410. Acceptance criterion #5 explicitly allows either; 409 + machine-readable code is more diagnostic.
- **Records are shared refs** between `entry.pendingApprovals` and the registry. JS is single-threaded; no lock needed.
- **Compat hydrator preserved** — `hydrateApprovalEscalationsFromSessions` is still exported in case any external caller depends on it.

## Tests (hermetic)

| File | What it covers |
|---|---|
| `src/lib/__tests__/approval-registry.test.ts` (new, 10 tests) | Register, list/filter/order, detach keeps record actionable=false, applyApprovalAction success + 409 + 404 + reattach |
| `src/lib/__tests__/approvals-route.test.ts` (new, 4 tests) | GET shape + repo/cursor/status filters |
| `src/lib/__tests__/approvals-actions-route.test.ts` (new, 7 tests) | POST happy path × 3 actions, 409 detach, 404 unknown, 400 invalid, 502 responder failure |
| `src/lib/__tests__/terminal-approval-compat-route.test.ts` (new, 2 tests) | Compat route 404 on missing session, otherwise delegates to canonical |
| `src/lib/__tests__/openapi-approvals.test.ts` (new, 5 tests) | Paths + schemas + `TerminalSession.pendingApprovals` |
| `src/lib/__tests__/terminal-approval-session.test.ts` (extended) | Cleanup helper detach keeps record visible with actionable=false |
| `src/hooks/__tests__/use-terminal-panel-effects.test.ts` (modified) | UI hydrates from API instead of session list |

All 36 approval-related tests pass; full `bun run test` suite stays at 3022 passing.

## Quality gates

`bun run lint` ✅ — `bunx tsc --noEmit` ✅ — `bun run test` ✅ (3022 passing) — `bun run build` ✅
